meaning: n.轮盘赌,点线机,转迹线,刻骑缝孔的齿轮
examples: No one is listening. Everyone is jammed around the 800 tables, focused on the flip of cards, the spin of the roulette wheel or the roll of dice.
You are playing Russian roulette every time you have unprotected sex.
For example, I am playing roulette.
Economists of all persuasions believe that debt ceiling roulette is a very bad idea.
Paul Mazursky is deliciously sleazy as Morris Levy, the president of Roulette Records (and copyright thief).
